title: activate_subscription: set + delete not atomic, allows double-activation
description: payment_watcher.rs activate_subscription() runs set_subscription() then delete_invoice() as two separate awaits. If set_subscription succeeds but delete_invoice fails (transient DB error), the function returns Err. The caller (scan_block) logs a warning and continues. On the next block scan, the same invoice is still present (delete failed), so activate_subscription is called again, writing a SECOND subscription row or extending the expiry a second time. Fix: wrap both DB calls in a single SQLite transaction so they succeed or fail atomically.
